name: The Union
summary: Guild-backed successor order replacing Mal’s active trade-mediation role across the former Mal sphere.
motive: Keep trade moving, disputes arbitrated, and guild power coordinated without returning to fallen-house paralysis.
power_relations: Dominant in trade governance but dependent on member guild cooperation and imperial sanction
visible_membership_base: Guild delegates, merchant arbiters, sanction clerks, caravan coordinators.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Its legitimacy rests on fairness; once people think the network is rigged, compliance decays fast.
